description: In 2022, I completed a 4-week internship at the Hospital Hollabrunn. I worked in the IT department, where I was responsible for setting up and maintaining the hospital's computer systems. I also assisted with troubleshooting and resolving technical issues.

My favorite internship was at MBIT Solutions GmbH, where I worked as a software developer. I was involved in a project where some college friends and I developed an eCommerce platform with the nopCommerce framework, which was amazingly adaptable via a plugin system. This company also supported a healthy work-life balance and many goodies like free drinks and fruits.

After completing the college, I started working for the worldwide well-known independent company Red Cross and Crescent. I joined as a Civilian servent because I didn't want to join the army. In these 9 months, I learned a lot about other people's lives and how to help people in need. I liked working there so much that I decided to stay and volunteer.

Since 2025, I have been working at Fronius International GmbH as a software developer. I am involved in the development of a new software platform for the company's solar energy products. This platform is designed to be highly scalable and flexible, allowing for easy integration with other systems. I am also responsible for maintaining and improving the existing software systems.
